Version.description: First Release! Cant wait to see all the ways this gets broken during gameplay
Version.title: Version 1.0.0

v.1.2.0.description:
Reworked the Chest Checks into a currency to spend in a check shop, hopefully reducing the amount of hassle involved in getting a important item in a late chest check number.
Allowed options for locking specializations behind the APworld
Added More logic to checks to prevent early important items being behind late checks
Added a system to give the checks found while the player is offline, (Sorry to Xetro, Math, NightKnight, and anyone else for ruining your sync :P)
v.1.2.0.title: Version 1.2.0

v.1.2.3.description:
Fixed an Error that caused progressive Gear Rarity, Level Cap, (And likely xp and loot scaling) to be reset if either the server shutoff, or the VH client restarted.
[Thanks to Kcitra and Jowwel for being the finders of the bug]
v.1.2.3.title: Version 1.2.3

v.1.2.4.description:
More Refining Done on displaying locked skills.

Fixes:
Specializations now properly display the [Locked By Archipelago] tooltip when locked
Removed the extra [Skill: Angel] that pointed to nothing

Additions:
Made unlocking a specialization when the parent skill is locked, learn the parent skill instead, and then the base skill unlocks the specialization.
Added 2 commands (/APchat, /MCchat) allowing for each player to toggle their Minecraft chat to allow for ap commands, and messaging.
(Chat Mode is saved between server/world resets)
v.1.2.4.title: Version 1.2.4

v.1.2.4-pre.description:
(Actually contains the apworld and jar file now)
Marker as Pre-Release as the development for this update went by a little too smoothly, and i fear they may be bugs, or I forgot something I wanted to add...

Additions:
Added an option in the YAML to force Quest Check rewards to not be Progressive after a certain amount
Added DeathLink (Untested in Multiplayer)
Added DeathLink Vault Only (Death Links will only send and recieve when the player is inside a vault)
Added DeathLink Vault Curse (Makes received DeathLinks curse the next/current vault instead of killing the player
Added Progessive Level Cap Size (Default: -1, Any other number should unlock the respective amount of levels per cap) [Requested by @sparky5000 on discord]

Fixes:
Should have fixed the skills, talents, mods, and expertise logic problems brought up by @angrevol on discord, including Herald logic as well
Fixed Vault Jewels not Rolling Stats/Modifiers
Should have fixed multiplayer sending quests for all players involved, Should now only check quests for the player who ran the connect command.
Fixed the Check-Table block not showing in search JEI


And probably something else but im too tired right now to remember.
v.1.2.4-pre.title: Version 1.2.4-pre

v.1.2.5.description:
Changes:
Changed the Artifact Puzzle and Herald Goal to follow mcguffin logic, requiring AP to give you the 25 artifacts before you can goal. Vault Hunters can no longer give you artifacts from loot tables

Additions:
To complement the new mcguffin goals. The check table now has an "artifacts" tab allowing players to claim artifacts should they be destroyed or lost.
Deathlink messages now rats out the player that sent it.

Fixes:
Fixed Xp and Loot scaling being reset after relogging in.
v.1.2.5.title: Version 1.2.5

v1.0.1.description: Fixed an Error where only local connections were possible
v1.0.1.title: Version 1.0.1

v1.1.0.description:
Implemented Progressive Level Cap, XP Scaling, and Loot Scaling, as well as the option to lock specializations of skills behind AP checks.

Allowed the player to choos how many Progressive XP and Loot scaling. (The world starts at 0.1 for xp and 0.5 for loot, and both can go up to 5x)
v1.1.0.title: Version 1.1.0

v1.1.1.description:
Added Progressive Gear Rarity, and Starter Pack YAML Option. 
Starter pack gives the player: full iron gear, 16x raw chromatic iron, 10x vault stone, and a vault altar.
This allows the player to jump straight into the vaults.
v1.1.1.title: Version 1.1.1

v1.1.2.description:
Changed base name "Filler" in the APworld to show the actual filler item.

SHOULD have implemented Mulltiplayer servers correctly (May have trouble connecting to a locally hosted AP world [With Localhost IP] but not a large issue currently
v1.1.2.title: Version 1.1.2

v1.2.1.description:
Tweaked Some Filler Item Names
Fixed Check Table and APworld Incorectly Expecting more locations
Added a simple gray box overlapping skills, talents, expertises, and mods that are locked by Archipelago.

Fixed some minor bugs.
v1.2.1.title: Version 1.2.1

v1.2.2.description:
Thanks to Scope Creep*:
Added a sound (TBOI Dime Pickup) when archipela-bits are found in the vault. (Recommended By Doofnuget)


*My desire to keep adding small things to the project
v1.2.2.title: Version 1.2.2
